caption: A close-up shot focuses on the rear bumper of a white car parked on a light-colored paved surface next to a grassy area. The vehicle features a chrome "CORVETTE" emblem and a Florida license plate with the text "WTR" and "SUNSHINE STATE" visible. To the right of the plate, the text "L36 6.57" is inscribed on the bumper. Two black oval vents are located on the right side of the car's rear. Across the sequence, the camera moves slightly, shifting its angle and position. The lighting changes subtly as the camera pans, causing different reflections on the white paint and chrome surfaces. No people are present in the scene, and the focus remains entirely on the detailed rear section of the vehicle.
